skills.inputs_short: Needs: decision to record; context and problem statement; relevant options or alternatives; chosen path and rationale.
skills.main_anti_patterns_short: Avoid: writing an ADR for a trivial edit with no real decision; using inflated language to mask weak reasoning; recording the chosen path without naming consequences; letting the ADR drift away from the actual change.
skills.name: aoa-adr-write
skills.outputs_short: Produces: concise decision note or ADR draft; statement of rationale; consequence notes; canonical placement or reference for the note.
skills.summary: Record a meaningful architectural or workflow decision, place it in the canonical note surface, and verify that future readers can find the rationale rather than only the outcome.

skills.verification_short: Checks: confirm the decision was meaningful enough to record; confirm the rationale is explicit; confirm consequences or tradeoffs are named; confirm the note aligns with the real change surface.
skills.workflow_short: Purpose: capture an architectural, structural, or workflow decision in a concise reviewable note, then place and verify that note in the canonical repo surface to the rationale stays findable. Flow: state the context and the problem the decision...

skills.inputs_short: Needs: requested action; touched surfaces; known approval state; risk signals.
skills.main_anti_patterns_short: Avoid: assuming approval because a task sounds routine; collapsing several risk levels into a single vague warning; using approval logic to avoid useful bounded analysis; hiding destructive steps behind innocent labels.
skills.name: aoa-approval-gate-check

skills.summary: Classify whether a requested action should proceed, wait for explicit approval, or be refused at the current authority level.

skills.verification_short: Checks: confirm the touched surfaces were identified; confirm the approval need was classified explicitly rather than as a vague warning; confirm the next step fits the stated authority level; confirm uncertainty...
skills.workflow_short: Purpose: classify whether a requested action crosses an approval boundary and to return a bounded next step that keeps authority explicit before any execution proceeds. Flow: identify the requested action and touched surfaces -> assess whether the action...

skills.inputs_short: Needs: target area or subsystem; current naming and responsibilities; known neighboring contexts; ambiguous or overloaded terms.
skills.main_anti_patterns_short: Avoid: inventing too many contexts for a small problem; renaming concepts without reducing confusion; treating context maps as proof of good architecture when interfaces remain muddy.
skills.name: aoa-bounded-context-map

skills.summary: Clarify or carve system and domain boundaries so changes stay semantically scoped and interface-aware.

skills.verification_short: Checks: confirm the main ambiguity was reduced; confirm interfaces or handoff points are named; confirm the output helps future scoped changes.
skills.workflow_short: Purpose: bounded-context thinking to reduce semantic drift, mixed responsibilities, and unclear interfaces. Flow: identify the target area and the terms people use for it -> separate responsibilities into bounded contexts or subsystems -> name what...

skills.inputs_short: Needs: target goal; touched files or surfaces; main risk; intended validation path.
skills.main_anti_patterns_short: Avoid: over-formalizing trivial edits; symbolic verification that creates false safety; using the report as a substitute for a readable diff; silently expanding the task during implementation.
skills.name: aoa-change-protocol
skills.outputs_short: Produces: explicit plan; scoped change; named verification result; concise final report.
skills.summary: Bounded workflow for Codex to plan a change, keep it scoped, verify it explicitly, and report it clearly.

skills.verification_short: Checks: confirm a plan existed before apply; confirm the change stayed scoped; confirm at least one explicit verification step was run or intentionally skipped with explanation; confirm the report includes outcome...

skills.inputs_short: Needs: boundary under review; expected inputs and outputs; current verification surface; known downstream dependencies.
skills.main_anti_patterns_short: Avoid: vague contracts that do not actually constrain behavior; treating a smoke summary as proof when it does not cover the real boundary; changing interface behavior without downstream impact notes.
skills.name: aoa-contract-test

skills.inputs_short: Needs: requested action; available preview or dry-run mechanisms; touched surfaces; known limits of the preview path.
